The Oligactis genus belongs to the family Commelinaceae, and it is a group of flowering plants. However, I found that Oligactis species are more commonly known as Spiderworts. Spiderwort (Oligactis or Tradescantia) is a perennial herb, and it is known for its medicinal properties. 

Spiderwort has been reported to have several health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. Spiderwort is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures. It is often used to treat various health conditions, including skin irritations, wounds, and digestive issues.
